html_topics.body_text: Project Roadmap This pre-week page should render before Week 1 instead of being forced into a weekly module. Milestones Review the course overview. Confirm the activity joins. Flag missing fields for human review. Tooling Notes The bundle also emits inventory, manifest probe, course structure, activity workbook, QA, JSON, Markdown, and DOCX outputs.
